/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/runTests.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/runTests.dir/test_init_conds.cpp.o -o runTests  -lgtest -lgtest_main -lpthread ../source/sh_prop/libsh_prop.a ../source/config/libconfig.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libyaml-cpp.so.0.8.0 ../source/io/libio.a ../source/config/libconfig.a ../source/utils/libutils.a
